title: Soup'd Up
description: Storage soups and mixing suspicious stew.
body:
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b2fd1e83d28cca11d7a353da269c9becaac41b4.png)
Storage soups and mixing suspicious stew.

## Features:

<details>
<summary>Soup Barrel</summary>
  • Stores up to 54 portions of soup of the same type (e.g., only mushroom stew or only suspicious stew).
  
##   Recipe:

![soup_barrel_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ccb580139e5c69818be4bf7c1d80e357db19fdc.gif)
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Mixed Suspicious Stew</summary>
  • Effect Mixing: Combine up to 3 status effects in a single stew (e.g., regeneration + speed + jump boost).
  
  • Duration Boost: Apply redstone dust to the stew to extend the duration of its effects.
</details>

## Soups:
- Salmon Soup ![food_half](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd97250b9677e84719b0eb2ee1bffa1d834cc416.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png) (![s_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4e402d56660e42d9c549ccac53276328be4027.png)x9) / Hearty Salmon Soup ![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png) (![s_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4e402d56660e42d9c549ccac53276328be4027.png)x15).
- Cod Soup ![food_half](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd97250b9677e84719b0eb2ee1bffa1d834cc416.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png) (![s_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4e402d56660e42d9c549ccac53276328be4027.png)x7) / Hearty Cod Soup ![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png) (![s_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4e402d56660e42d9c549ccac53276328be4027.png)x12).
- Sea Soup ![food_half](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd97250b9677e84719b0eb2ee1bffa1d834cc416.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png) (![s_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4e402d56660e42d9c549ccac53276328be4027.png)x3) + Nausea I for 3 seconds.
- Chorus Soup ![food_half](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd97250b9677e84719b0eb2ee1bffa1d834cc416.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png)![food_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eee0e1089f4ab263fd1e37edd09d5d4686addaf.png) (![s_full](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d4e402d56660e42d9c549ccac53276328be4027.png)x5) + Chorus Fruit behaviour.

- Simple and intuitive usage.
